description: Operations dashboard with placeholder panels for queues, OpenAI budget, scheduler, and delivery

options.content: Queue depth metrics will be available when BullMQ is wired in Phase 4.
Processing rate metrics will be available when BullMQ is wired in Phase 4.
OpenAI budget metrics will be available when the OpenAI client is implemented in Phase 3.
Scheduler job metrics will be available when scheduler jobs are implemented in Phase 4.
Misfire detection will be available when scheduler DST/window logic is implemented in Phase 4.
Delivery metrics will be available when delivery connectors are implemented in Phase 2.

title: Operations & Queues
